title: Floralcraft 50x75cm Tissue Paper Sheets - Light Blue (240 Sheets), Acid Free Gift Wrap Paper Bulk Packaging Paper Sheets for DIY Crafts Birthday Wedding Nursery Party Decorations
features: Premium quality tissue paper sheets - bleed resistant and acid free, making it an excellent choice for wrapping flowers, plants and gifts
Wrapping paper sheets is very easy to cut to size, you can have wonderful decorations or paper pompoms made for the various theme parties

The crafting tissue paper packs can be used as filler material in gift bags or as a protective wrapping for jewelry, is great as wrapping paper for a bridal shower, gift, bags, birthday, wine bottles, wedding favors, handicrafts, party decorations and much more
Wrapping tissue paper in Light Blue, ideal for creating paper flowers, pompoms, lanterns, window pictures, table decorations, etc.
Includes 240 Sheets tissue paper. Each sheet measures 19.7*29.5inch (50*75cm)
description: Floralcraft Tissue Paper (240 Sheets) - Light Blue, ideal for creating, paper flowers, pompoms, lanterns, window pictures, table decorations, etc.
